Class SubtotalBuilders

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.builder.subtotal.SubtotalBuilders
public class SubtotalBuilders extends Object
A set of methods of creating column subtotals
Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
